name_cn:
DAUPHINE Medium Bag #️⃣M45958
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications, with dynamic chip code changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic look! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website's latest full gift box!
25 x 17 x 10.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Front magnetic closure
2 interior pockets
Center zip pocket
Back interior slip pocket
Multiple carrying options
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 25.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 45.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 27.5 cm
Made in France
